title: Firmalife
description: Cooking and farming addon for TerraFirmaCraft
body:
## Firmalife

**Firmalife** is a cooking and farming addon for [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft/) for 1.12, 1.18, and beyond. It aims to add depth and realism to the food systems in the mod as well as provide a variety of different foods to eat. Many features from 1.7.10 TFC addons have been brought into Firmalife, making it a fresh yet nostalgic experience.
 
Documentation for Firmalife for 1.18+ lives on TFC's official [Field Guide Website](https://terrafirmacraft.github.io/Field-Guide/en_us/firmalife/), whereas the 1.12 documentation is on the [Github Wiki](https://github.com/eerussianguy/firmalife/wiki). The Github Wiki also contains API documentation for Firmalife for 1.18+.

# Features

- Brick oven for making bread, pizza, and other treats
- Modular oven appliances for grilling, boiling, and other systems
- Advanced bread making with yeast
- Beekeeping with bee breeding and genetics
- Chocolate-making
- Greenhouses for growing food in the winter
- Cellars for storing food
- Jarring fruit for preservation
- Pumpkin carving to make fancy jack o' lanterns
- Drying recipes, including drying fruit
- Advanced cheesemaking, including six different types of cheese, depending on the animal and preparation
- Vegan options, like pineapple leather, tofu, and other fun treats
-  Smoking meat and cheese just like in TFC Classic
-  Plates for immersive eating
-  Full JEI and datapack integration


**We use the Firmalife channel in the TFC discord for all communications:** https://discord.gg/PRuAKvY

 
This mod is MIT License, so you can do whatever you like with it, including put it in your pack.
